priority: PHP tokenizer extension over phrust lexer
scope: Selected upstream ext/tokenizer token_get_all variation rows
TOKEN_PARSE constant visibility and accepted flag handling
Open tag, whitespace, scalar, variable, punctuation, and inline HTML token output
Token array shape with id, text, and line number
Selected PHP 8.5 syntax tokens and invalid-octal overflow classification
PhpToken constructor public shape, getTokenName nullability, Stringable instance checks, ignorable token classification, string casting, method matching, and method error handling
non_scope: Token IDs matching raw Zend numeric values
Remaining PhpToken subclass/finality/extension behavior and tokenize EXPECTF coverage beyond the promoted constructor and method helpers
Heredoc recovery, bad-character token emission, and TOKEN_PARSE context-sensitive keyword reclassification
target_gates: nix develop -c cargo test -p php_runtime tokenizer --no-fail-fast
nix develop -c cargo test -p php_std tokenizer --no-fail-fast
next_step: Close remaining PhpToken subclass/finality/extension behavior, tokenize EXPECTF coverage, and heredoc/bad-character/TOKEN_PARSE lexer gaps before promoting the remaining upstream rows.
